texto: The nature of a work of art is to be not a part, nor yet a copy of the real world but a world in itself, independent, complete, autonomous; and to possess it fully you must enter that world, conform to its laws, and ignore for a time the beliefs, aims, and particular conditions which belong to you in the other world of reality.
explicacao: Orientação direta de A.C. Bradley sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “The nature of a work of art is to be not a part, nor yet a copy of the real world but a world in …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, art, world, útil em momentos de termino e trabalho.
